Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tartarus Travelers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Tartarus Travelers guard the King's private library in Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Tartarus Travelers wear gleaming steel and carry keys.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — There is a squad of three or four Tartarus Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Tartarus Travelers use small silver keys made of Tartarus steel for summoning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Tartarus Travelers carry silver keys.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — A Tartarus Traveler escaped through her Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Shai once found her way into the Tartarus Travelers' barracks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — A Tartarus Traveler was involved in the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Tartarus Travelers can summon needles, spinning blades, metal beasts, and glass tornadoes.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — There are three Tartarus Travelers present.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
